name: audiobookshelf-mcp
description: Browse libraries, search books, and control playback in Audiobookshelf.

audiobookshelf_url.title: Audiobookshelf URL
audiobookshelf_url.description: Base URL of your Audiobookshelf instance (e.g. https://audiobooks.example.com)

audiobookshelf_token.title: API Token
audiobookshelf_token.description: API token from Audiobookshelf Settings → API Keys
